---
title: "Blog"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Einblicke, Tutorials und Updates von unserem Team"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  feed: true
  grid-columns: 3
page-layout: custom
toc: false
site-url: https://chen.ist/de
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="blog-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Unser <span class="gr">Blog</span></h1>
    <p>Einblicke in Cybersicherheit, Open-Source-Leitfäden und Infrastruktur-Analysen von unserem Team.</p>
    <div class="blog-bar">
      <div class="blog-lang-switch">
        <a href="/blog.html">EN</a>
        <a href="/ro/blog.html">RO</a>
        <a href="/sv/blogg.html">SV</a>
        <a href="/de/blog.html" class="active">DE</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="blog-featured">
  <a href="/de/blog/open-source-europe-nextcloud-libreoffice.html" class="blog-featured-card" style="text-decoration:none; color:inherit;">
    <div class="blog-featured-img">
      <img src="/assets/images/stock/cloud-sky.webp" alt="Open Source in Europa" loading="lazy">
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="blog-featured-tag"><i class="bi bi-star-fill" style="font-size:0.6rem;"></i> Neueste</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-title">Open-Source in Europa: Nextcloud und LibreOffice</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-desc">Echte Fallstudien europäischer Regierungen bei der Open-Source-Einführung.</div>
      <div class="blog-featured-meta">
        <span><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> 26. März 2026</span>
        <span><i class="bi bi-tag"></i> Open Source, Europa</span>
      </div>
      <span class="blog-featured-link">Artikel lesen</span>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>

<div style="max-width:1200px; margin:2rem auto 0; padding:0 2rem;">
  <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06); padding-bottom:0.75rem;">
    <span style="font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.1em; color:#86868b;">Alle Artikel</span>
    <a href="/de/blog.xml" style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.3rem; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:500; color:#f26522; text-decoration:none;"><i class="bi bi-rss"></i> RSS</a>
  </div>
</div>

```

::: {.container style="margin-bottom:3rem;"}
:::

```{=html}
<div class="blog-cta" style="padding:5rem 2rem;">
  <div class="container">
    <div style="width:36px;height:3px;background:#81BD4A;margin:0 auto 2rem;border-radius:2px;opacity:0.6;"></div>
    <h2>Bleiben Sie informiert</h2>
    <p>Abonnieren Sie unseren RSS-Feed, Newsletter oder folgen Sie uns für die neuesten Artikel.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/de/blog.xml" class="m-b" style="background:#f26522;"><i class="bi bi-rss me-2"></i>RSS abonnieren</a>
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b" style="background:#ff6719;"><i class="bi bi-envelope me-2"></i>Substack</a>
      <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chenistsec" target="_blank" class="m-bo"><i class="bi bi-linkedin me-2"></i>Folgen</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```
